WILLREROLL.Settings.allowTrainerWill.nam: Allow Trainer Will for Pokémon Rerolls
WILLREROLL.Settings.allowTrainerWill.hin: If enabled, players can choose whether to use the Pokémon's Will or the assigned Trainer's Will when rerolling.
WILLREROLL.Settings.allowMultipleRerolls: If enabled, the reroll button remains available after each use. If disabled, the button is removed after the first reroll or cancel.
WILLREROLL.Settings.showWillMessage.name: Show Will Message
WILLREROLL.Settings.showWillMessage.hint: If enabled, a chat message with a flavor text about using Will will be displayed after each reroll.
WILLREROLL.Settings.allowRerollAllDice.h: If enabled, a 'Reroll All Dice' button will appear in the dialog, allowing you to reroll all dice (including successful ones) at once.
WILLREROLL.Button.label: Use Will
WILLREROLL.Dialog.title: Will Reroll
WILLREROLL.Dialog.selectDice: Select the dice you want to reroll.
WILLREROLL.Notifications.noDiceSelected: You have not selected any dice.
WILLREROLL.Notifications.costMismatch: The distributed Will costs must add up to exactly the number of selected dice.
